data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizing decision-making time by simplifying user choices.
data.technical_spec: Simple and logical menu structures with easily accessible options.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs that allow quick and effective interactions, reducing the distance to actionable buttons.
data.technical_spec: Responsive button placement and size optimization on mobile and desktop.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Utilizes proximity, similarity, and closure in visual design for effective grouping and navigation.
data.technical_spec: Consistent iconography and spacing for intuitive groupings.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Information chunking to improve content comprehension and recall.
data.technical_spec: Video thumbnails and titles are designed for clarity and instant recognition.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Interfaces following user expectations based on their experiences with other sites.
data.technical_spec: Adoption of industry-standard design patterns like menu placement and video controls.
